targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', timestamp_req) AS time,
  chave_id::text AS cliente,
  COUNT(*) AS requisicoes
FROM plataforma.log_uso
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp_req)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  chave_id::text AS chave,
  COUNT(*) AS requisicoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN codigo_status >= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS erros_5xx,
  ROUND(AVG(latencia_ms)) AS latencia_media_ms,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cache_hit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cache_hits
FROM plataforma.log_uso
WHERE date(timestamp_req) = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  endpoint,
  COUNT(*) AS chamadas,
  ROUND(AVG(latencia_ms)) AS latencia_media_ms
FROM plataforma.log_uso
WHERE date(timestamp_req) = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10
